name: vignette
title: Vignette
description: A static cinematic vignette: a radial darkening at the canvas edges that frames the center. Atmospheric overlay with no motion — like GrainOverlay, it is set dressing, not a performer. Deterministic, self-contained, pointer-transparent.

  "name": "vignette",
